title: Spicy Tagine Fish
description: A Chinese-inspired dish that combines the flavors of the tagine with the freshness of fish, all in a moist and flavorful sauce.

ingredients.name: Fish fillets
ingredients.notes: any white fish, such as cod or tilapia

ingredients.name: Tagine spice blend
ingredients.notes: or make your own with cumin, coriander, cinnamon, and turmeric

ingredients.name: Brown sugar
ingredients.notes: or honey for a different flavor

ingredients.name: Water
ingredients.notes: or fish stock for added depth

instructions: Season the fish with salt and pepper.
Heat a skillet over medium heat and add the sliced ginger and minced garlic.
Cook for 1-2 minutes until fragrant, then add the tagine spice blend and cook for another minute.
Add the chili peppers and cook for an additional minute.
Add the soy sauce, brown sugar, and rice vinegar to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the fish to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until browned.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes, until the fish is cooked through.
Serve the fish with the spicy tagine sauce spooned over the top.
